title: Add fusion detail (partner/type) where openly reported
context: Ewing models are defined by EWSR1 fusions; this task enriches records with fusion partner/type only where openly reported and provenance-stamped, never inferred (PLAN M2). Depends on the v0.1 release (011); domain reviewer verifies fusion calls. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Enrich catalog records with fusion partner/type detail where openly reported, each value provenance-stamped and domain-reviewed.
acceptanceCriteria: Fusion partner/type added only where openly reported in a cited source; each value provenance-stamped; no inferred or model-originated fusion calls.
explicitUnknowns records models where fusion detail is not openly available.
Domain reviewer with sarcoma/cancer-genomics literacy spot-checks fusion calls before publish.
output: Catalog fusion fields populated where openly reported, with provenance and explicitUnknowns for the rest.
